docData.title: Wound Care Concepts - Protected Google Site
docData.subtitle: Domain-restricted course access for Perry Home Wound Care learners
docData.description: This Innovacare course launches the Perry Home Wound Care Google Site for domain-authorized learners and keeps a minimal completion record inside Innovacare. Learners must sign in with a perryhomewoundcare.network Google account to view the protected Google Site.
docData.accomodations: Learners must use an authorized perryhomewoundcare.network Google account. Contact the training administrator if access is denied.
disclosures: This course links to a domain-restricted Google Site. Content access is controlled by Google Workspace permissions.
Innovacare can track course-shell completion, but it cannot verify every page interaction inside Google Sites.
prerequisites: Authorized Google account ending in perryhomewoundcare.network
requirements: Review each required Google Site section

blocks.title: Open the Perry Home Wound Care Course Site
blocks.bodyHtml:
This course is hosted on a protected Google Site. Open it in a new tab and sign in with your perryhomewoundcare.network Google account.

Open protected Google Site

blocks.title: Before You Continue
blocks.introHtml: Open each item to confirm the access requirements.

items.title: Use the correct Google account
items.bodyHtml: You must sign in with an authorized Google account from perryhomewoundcare.network. Personal Gmail accounts may be blocked.

items.title: Open in a new tab
items.bodyHtml: Protected Google Sites usually work best when opened in a separate browser tab. If you see a Google sign-in screen, sign in and then return to Innovacare.

items.title: Understand tracking limits
items.bodyHtml: Innovacare records that you launched and acknowledged the course. It cannot automatically track every click inside Google Sites unless the Google Site content is rebuilt as native Innovacare lessons.

blocks.title: Review These Google Site Areas
blocks.introHtml: Use this checklist while reviewing the protected Google Site.

tabs.label: Concepts
tabs.title: Wound Care Concepts
tabs.bodyHtml:
Review the Wound Care Concepts page, including the history of wound care and foundational care principles.

Open Google Site

tabs.label: Types
tabs.title: Types of Wounds
tabs.bodyHtml:
Review wound types and how different wound characteristics affect care decisions.

Open Google Site

blocks.title: Wound Bed Preparation Review
blocks.introHtml: Open each reminder while reviewing the Google Site section.

items.title: Assessment
items.bodyHtml:
Review how wound assessment supports care planning, documentation, and escalation.

Open Google Site

items.title: Preparation
items.bodyHtml: Review wound bed preparation concepts and how they support healing-focused wound care.

items.title: Care decisions
items.bodyHtml: Review how wound characteristics and patient context influence dressing and care choices.

lessons.title: So Many Choices, Key Takeaways, and Conclusion

blocks.title: Final Google Site Review
blocks.introHtml: Open each card after reviewing the matching Google Site area.

cards.title: So Many Choices
cards.teaser: Review product and care option decision-making.
cards.bodyHtml:
Review the Google Site section about available wound care choices and how to think through care selection.

Open Google Site

cards.title: Key Takeaways
cards.bodyHtml: Review the key takeaways and connect them to your role and documentation responsibilities.

cards.title: Conclusion and References
cards.bodyHtml: Review the conclusion, course contributors, and references/resources pages before completing this Innovacare shell course.

blocks.title: Course Acknowledgement
blocks.introHtml: Open each item to complete your acknowledgement.

items.title: I accessed the protected Google Site
items.bodyHtml: I confirm that I opened the Perry Home Wound Care Google Site using my authorized domain account.

items.title: I reviewed the required sections
items.bodyHtml: I confirm that I reviewed the Wound Care Concepts, Types of Wounds, Wound Bed Preparation, So Many Choices, Key Takeaways, Conclusion, Course Contributors, and References areas.

items.title: I know how to request help
items.bodyHtml: If I cannot access the protected Google Site, I will contact my supervisor or training administrator for domain access support.

blocks.html: Completion note: This Innovacare record confirms completion of the protected Google Site review shell. For full per-page tracking and quizzes, rebuild the Google Site content as native Innovacare lessons.
